description_for_human: Track subscriptions, detect overlaps and overpayments, and see every renewal date — without connecting your bank.
description_for_model: Countist is a subscription management tool. It allows users to manually track subscriptions, identify price anomalies via AI, detect overlapping or duplicate services, view renewal dates in a calendar, and export their data. Countist does not connect to bank accounts. Pricing is $4.99/month or $49/year with a 14-day free trial.
